subcodes.first_line: The primary purpose of God, exalted be His glory, in creating all created things hath been the manifestation of His grace, His mercy and His loving-kindness, that all might [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصود اولیه حق جل جلاله از خلقت خلق ظهور عنایت و مرحمت و شفقت بوده تا کل
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @purpose; goal of creation, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @personal instructions
